item.title: datafuselabs / databend
item.description:
Desc: A modern cloud data warehouse focusing on reducing cost and complexity for your massive-scale analytics needs. Open source alternative to Snowflake. Also available in the cloud: https://app.databend.com
Lang: Rust
Star: 5303

item.title: slint-ui / slint
item.description:
Desc: Slint is a toolkit to efficiently develop fluid graphical user interfaces for any display: embedded devices and desktop applications. We support multiple programming languages, such as Rust, C++ or JavaScript.
Lang: Rust
Star: 5804
